params.name: Bronze Big Bird Head
params.description: It was excavated in the Sanxingdui ritual pit II and is the largest of all the bird-shaped artifacts in the Sanxingdui. It may have been a decorative object on a temple or mounted on top of some object as a symbol for ceremonial purposes.
